languages.text: "Так это правда? Вы — все, что осталось от подкрепления дома Гапрак?" {n}Несколько мгновений Себериан ошеломленно молчит, а когда говорит вновь, его искаженный механизированный голос звучит тише и напряженнее.{/n} "Забудем. Я ценю вашу верность, {mf|лорд|леди} Гапрак. Жаль, что наша встреча проходит при столь прискорбных обстоятельствах. Я распоряжусь, чтобы вам предоставили покои — война или нет, я не позволю кому-либо упрекнуть дом фон Валанциус в отсутствии манер".

"So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

Вы — все, что осталось от подкрепления дома Гапрак?" {n}Несколько мгновений Себериан ошеломленно молчит, а когда говорит вновь, его искаженный механизированный голос звучит тише и напряженнее.{/n} "Забудем. Я ценю вашу верность, {mf|лорд|леди} Гапрак. Жаль, что наша встреча проходит при столь прискорбных обстоятельствах. Я распоряжусь, чтобы вам предоставили покои — война или нет, я не позволю кому-либо упрекнуть дом фон Валанциус в отсутствии манер".

I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

"So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

languages.text: “这么说是真的？贾帕克家的援军就只剩你们了？”{n}塞贝里安惊得半晌无言，待他再度开口时，那失真的机械嗓音愈发微弱而吃力。{/n}“不提这个了。我感念你的忠心，很遗憾我们偏偏在如此凄凉的处境下会面。我会命人为你安排住处。无论战事如何，我断不会让人指责冯·瓦兰修斯家待客不周。”
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

traits.locale_text: “这么说是真的？贾帕克家的援军就只剩你们了？”{n}塞贝里安惊得半晌无言，待他再度开口时，那失真的机械嗓音愈发微弱而吃力。{/n}“不提这个了。我感念你的忠心，很遗憾我们偏偏在如此凄凉的处境下会面。我会命人为你安排住处。无论战事如何，我断不会让人指责冯·瓦兰修斯家待客不周。”

languages.text: « Alors, c'est bien vrai ? Vous êtes tout ce qu'il reste des renforts dépêchés par la maison Gaprak ? » {n}Seberian reste sans voix l'espace de quelques instants, et quand il repend la parole, sa voix mécanique déformée est tout à la fois plus calme et plus désabusée.{/n} « Oubliez ce que j'ai dit. J'apprécie votre loyauté, {mf|seigneur|dame} Gaprak. Dommage que notre rencontre ait lieu en d'aussi fâcheuses circonstances. Je veillerai à ce qu'on vous attribue des quartiers confortables. Guerre ou pas, il ne sera pas dit que la maison von Valancius aura manqué aux lois de l'hospitalité. »
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

traits.locale_text: « Alors, c'est bien vrai ? Vous êtes tout ce qu'il reste des renforts dépêchés par la maison Gaprak ? » {n}Seberian reste sans voix l'espace de quelques instants, et quand il repend la parole, sa voix mécanique déformée est tout à la fois plus calme et plus désabusée.{/n} « Oubliez ce que j'ai dit. J'apprécie votre loyauté, {mf|seigneur|dame} Gaprak. Dommage que notre rencontre ait lieu en d'aussi fâcheuses circonstances. Je veillerai à ce qu'on vous attribue des quartiers confortables. Guerre ou pas, il ne sera pas dit que la maison von Valancius aura manqué aux lois de l'hospitalité. »

languages.text: "Doğru mu yani? Gaprak Hanesi takviyelerinden geriye bir tek sen mi kaldın?" {n}Seberian, bir anlığına sessizliğe gömülüyor. Tekrar konuşmaya başladığında bozulmuş mekanik sesi, daha suskun ve gergin çıkıyor.{/n} "Bunu göz ardı edelim. Sadakatini takdir ediyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Tanışmamızın böylesine kederli koşullar altında gerçekleşmesi büyük talihsizlik. Sana kalacak yer tahsis ettireceğim. Savaş olsun ya da olmasın, kimsenin von Valancius Hanesi'ni misafirperverlikte kusur etmekle suçlamasına müsaade edemem."
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

traits.locale_text: "Doğru mu yani? Gaprak Hanesi takviyelerinden geriye bir tek sen mi kaldın?" {n}Seberian, bir anlığına sessizliğe gömülüyor. Tekrar konuşmaya başladığında bozulmuş mekanik sesi, daha suskun ve gergin çıkıyor.{/n} "Bunu göz ardı edelim. Sadakatini takdir ediyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Tanışmamızın böylesine kederli koşullar altında gerçekleşmesi büyük talihsizlik. Sana kalacak yer tahsis ettireceğim. Savaş olsun ya da olmasın, kimsenin von Valancius Hanesi'ni misafirperverlikte kusur etmekle suçlamasına müsaade edemem."

languages.text: «Entonces ¿es cierto? ¿Son todo lo que queda de los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak?». {n}Seberian queda aturdido por unos momentos y, cuando recupera el habla, su voz mecánica es más callada y está más cansada.{/n} «No me haga caso. Le agradezco la lealtad, {mf|lord|lady} Gaprak. Es una lástima que nuestro encuentro tenga lugar en semejantes circunstancias. Me aseguraré de que dispone de aposentos adecuados. Guerra o no, no consentiré que se acuse a la casa von Valancius de falta de hospitalidad».
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

traits.locale_text: «Entonces ¿es cierto? ¿Son todo lo que queda de los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak?». {n}Seberian queda aturdido por unos momentos y, cuando recupera el habla, su voz mecánica es más callada y está más cansada.{/n} «No me haga caso. Le agradezco la lealtad, {mf|lord|lady} Gaprak. Es una lástima que nuestro encuentro tenga lugar en semejantes circunstancias. Me aseguraré de que dispone de aposentos adecuados. Guerra o no, no consentiré que se acuse a la casa von Valancius de falta de hospitalidad».

languages.text: "Dann stimmt es also? Ihr seid alles, was von der Verstärkung von Haus Gaprak übrig ist?" {n}Seberian schweigt einige Momente lang verblüfft. Als er weiterspricht, klingt seine verzerrte mechanische Stimme leiser und angespannter.{/n} "Vergesst das. Ich weiß Eure Loyalität zu schätzen, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Es ist wirklich bedauerlich, dass wir uns unter derart unerfreulichen Umständen begegnen. Ich werde Eure Unterbringung veranlassen ... Krieg hin oder her ... niemand soll Haus von Valancius mangelnde Gastfreundschaft vorwerfen können."
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

Als er weiterspricht, klingt seine verzerrte mechanische Stimme leiser und angespannter.{/n} "Vergesst das. Ich weiß Eure Loyalität zu schätzen, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Es ist wirklich bedauerlich, dass wir uns unter derart unerfreulichen Umständen begegnen. Ich werde Eure Unterbringung veranlassen ... Krieg hin oder her ... niemand soll Haus von Valancius mangelnde Gastfreundschaft vorwerfen können."

languages.text: 「つまり、本当ですか？ガプラク家の補強兵は皆、あなたたちだけですか？」{n}シベリアはしばらく沈黙し、再び口を開くと、機械的な声が歪んで、より弱く、苦しいものになっていた。{/n}「それは無視してください。ガプラク卿、貴方の忠誠に感謝します。このような悲惨な状況下で会えるのは残念ですが、貴方の宿泊は私が手配します。戦争が起ちても、ヴァランシウス家は不快な思いをさせないでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、本当ですか？ガプラク家の補強兵は皆、あなたたちだけですか？」{n}シベリアはしばらく沈黙し、再び口を開くと、機械的な声が歪んで、より弱く、苦しいものになっていた。{/n}「それは無視してください。ガプラク卿、貴方の忠誠に感謝します。このような悲惨な状況下で会えるのは残念ですが、貴方の宿泊は私が手配します。戦争が起ちても、ヴァランシウス家は不快な思いをさせないでしょう。」
